return(function(x,d,m,z,L,r,J,I,E,X,w,V,B,O,s,o,S,A,K,Y,D,q,a)O,q,I,a,B,A,D,E,w,V,s,S,K,o,X,Y=function(x,l)local d=E(l)local m=function(...)return B(x,{...},l,d)end return m end,{},function(x,l)local d=E(l)local m=function(m,z,L,r,J,a)return B(x,{m,z,L,r,J,a},l,d)end return m end,{},function(B,m,z,L)local
